goal: Modernize the iOS development stack: migrate to SPM, port loto from Android, and add Maestro E2E tests across all apps.

projects.name: SPM Migration
projects.goal: Migrate all iOS libraries from CocoaPods to Swift Package Manager
projects.summary: Add Package.resolved to .gitignore, remove tracked .package.resolved across all SPM modules

projects.name: Loto 6/49
projects.goal: Port the Loto 6/49 feature from Android to iOS (happy flow US-015)
projects.summary: Add loto history bottom sheet, ticket details, claim prize, and fix cell tap flow

projects.name: Maestro E2E Tests
projects.goal: Add and fix Maestro UI tests across all iOS codebases
projects.summary: Removed claude shared submodule, improving maestro tests
